title: goety-client-fix
description:
Goety Client Fix
Fixes client-side memory leaks caused by Goety mods for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge).
body:
Goety Client Fix
Fixes client-side memory leaks caused by Goety mods for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge).

Problem
When a player dies/respawns or changes dimension, the old LocalPlayer and ClientLevel objects are not garbage collected. This causes client memory to grow continuously, eventually leading to lag and crashes.

Fixes
Invalidates old player and level capabilities on respawn/dimension change to break reference chains
Clears Mob.target and LivingEntity.lastHurtByMob references to the old player in the client level
Clears static Entity/Player/Level fields in Goety/GoetyAwaken client event handlers via reflection
Periodic cleanup (every 30s) to catch any lingering references
Requirements
Forge 47+ (Minecraft 1.20.1)
Client-side only, server does not need this mod
